events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: a **pass** at `rough-complete` stage (≈90% complete, low risk). No defective or non-compliant conditions were evident in the erection/plumb work itself — remaining items (cleanup, labeling, finish work) fall outside this checkpoint's scope. Actions noted are documentation/verification steps (plumb survey vs. AISC 303 tolerances, bolt-up/torque records, OSHA 1926 Subpart R bracing status) rather than corrective rework.
